name: homurabi
description: Real Ruby + Sinatra on Cloudflare Workers via Opal

scripts.build:opal: OPAL_PREFORK_DISABLE=1 bundle exec opal -c -E --esm --no-source-map -I gems/cloudflare-workers-runtime/lib -I lib -I vendor -I build -r opal_patches -r cloudflare_workers -r homurabi_templates -r homurabi_assets -o "${HOMURABI_OPAL_OUTPUT:-build/hello.no-exit.mjs}" "${HOMURABI_OPAL_INPUT:-app/hello.rb}" 2>build/opal.stderr.log && node bin/patch-opal-evals.mjs "${HOMURABI_OPAL_PATCH_INPUT:-${HOMURABI_OPAL_OUTPUT:-build/hello.no-exit.mjs}}"
scripts.build: npm run build:erb && npm run build:assets && npm run build:opal
scripts.dev:dlq: npm run build && wrangler dev --env dlq-demo --port 8787 --ip 127.0.0.1
scripts.build:test: ruby bin/compile-erb && OPAL_PREFORK_DISABLE=1 bundle exec opal -c -E --esm --no-source-map -I gems/cloudflare-workers-runtime/lib -I lib -I vendor -I build -r opal_patches -r cloudflare_workers -r homurabi_templates -o build/smoke-test.mjs test/smoke.rb 2>build/opal.stderr.log
scripts.test: npm run build:test && node --import ./gems/cloudflare-workers-runtime/runtime/setup-node-crypto.mjs build/smoke-test.mjs && npm run test:http && npm run test:crypto && npm run test:jwt && npm run test:scheduled && npm run test:ai && npm run test:faraday && npm run test:multipart && npm run test:streaming && npm run test:octokit && npm run test:do && npm run test:cache && npm run test:queue && npm run test:sequel && npm run test:fiber-await && npm run test:classic-sinatra
scripts.build:classic-sinatra-test: OPAL_PREFORK_DISABLE=1 bundle exec opal -c -E --esm --no-source-map -I gems/cloudflare-workers-runtime/lib -I lib -I vendor -I build -r opal_patches -o build/classic-sinatra-smoke.mjs test/classic_sinatra_smoke.rb 2>build/opal.stderr.log
scripts.build:fiber-await-test: OPAL_PREFORK_DISABLE=1 bundle exec opal -c -E --esm --no-source-map -I gems/cloudflare-workers-runtime/lib -I lib -I vendor -I build -r opal_patches -o build/fiber-await-smoke.mjs test/fiber_await_smoke.rb 2>build/opal.stderr.log
scripts.build:sequel-test: OPAL_PREFORK_DISABLE=1 bundle exec opal -c -E --esm --no-source-map -I gems/cloudflare-workers-runtime/lib -I lib -I vendor -I build -r opal_patches -o build/sequel-smoke.mjs test/sequel_smoke.rb 2>build/opal.stderr.log
scripts.build:http-test: OPAL_PREFORK_DISABLE=1 bundle exec opal -c -E --esm --no-source-map -I gems/cloudflare-workers-runtime/lib -I lib -I vendor -I build -r opal_patches -o build/http-smoke.mjs test/http_smoke.rb 2>build/opal.stderr.log
scripts.build:crypto-test: OPAL_PREFORK_DISABLE=1 bundle exec opal -c -E --esm --no-source-map -I gems/cloudflare-workers-runtime/lib -I lib -I vendor -I build -r opal_patches -o build/crypto-smoke.mjs test/crypto_smoke.rb 2>build/opal.stderr.log
scripts.build:jwt-test: OPAL_PREFORK_DISABLE=1 bundle exec opal -c -E --esm --no-source-map -I gems/cloudflare-workers-runtime/lib -I lib -I vendor -I build -r opal_patches -o build/jwt-smoke.mjs test/jwt_smoke.rb 2>build/opal.stderr.log
scripts.build:ai-test: OPAL_PREFORK_DISABLE=1 bundle exec opal -c -E --esm --no-source-map -I gems/cloudflare-workers-runtime/lib -I lib -I vendor -I build -r opal_patches -o build/ai-smoke.mjs test/ai_smoke.rb 2>build/opal.stderr.log

scripts.build:cache-test: OPAL_PREFORK_DISABLE=1 bundle exec opal -c -E --esm --no-source-map -I gems/cloudflare-workers-runtime/lib -I lib -I vendor -I build -r opal_patches -o build/cache-smoke.mjs test/cache_smoke.rb 2>build/opal.stderr.log

scripts.clean: rm -f build/hello.no-exit.mjs build/smoke-test.mjs build/http-smoke.mjs build/crypto-smoke.mjs build/jwt-smoke.mjs build/ai-smoke.mjs build/scheduled-smoke.mjs build/faraday-smoke.mjs build/multipart-smoke.mjs build/streaming-smoke.mjs build/octokit-smoke.mjs build/do-smoke.mjs build/cache-smoke.mjs build/queue-smoke.mjs build/sequel-smoke.mjs build/homurabi_templates.rb build/homurabi_assets.rb build/opal.stderr.log
